title: Perform specialist amenity pruning
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Perform specialist amenity pruning demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Prepare for specialist amenity pruning

pcs.text: Identify and inspect plants and determine pruning strategy according to plant characteristics or desired outcome
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify and inspect plants and determine pruning strategy according to plant characteristics or desired outcome?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify and inspect plants and determine pruning strategy according to plant characteristics or desired outcome.

pcs.text: Identify common diseases, pests and nutrition deficiencies in plants
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify common diseases, pests and nutrition deficiencies in plants?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify common diseases, pests and nutrition deficiencies in plants.

pcs.text: Identify potential hazards and risks, and implement safe working practices to manage risks
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify potential hazards and risks, and implement safe working practices to manage risks?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify potential hazards and risks, and implement safe working practices to manage risks.

pcs.text: Select tools, equipment and machinery required to perform specialist pruning and check for safe operation
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Select tools, equipment and machinery required to perform specialist pruning and check for safe operation?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Select tools, equipment and machinery required to perform specialist pruning and check for safe operation.

pcs.text: Select, fit, use and maintain personal protective equipment (PPE) applicable to the task
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Select, fit, use and maintain personal protective equipment (PPE) applicable to the task?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Select, fit, use and maintain personal protective equipment (PPE) applicable to the task.

pcs.text: Consult references where required to determine best pruning strategies for special plants
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Consult references where required to determine best pruning strategies for special plants?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Consult references where required to determine best pruning strategies for special plants.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Prepare for specialist amenity pruning

elements.title: Undertake specialist pruning

pcs.text: Undertake pruning using established and specialist pruning techniques
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Undertake pruning using established and specialist pruning techniques?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Undertake pruning using established and specialist pruning techniques.

pcs.text: Adhere to site environmental and disease control procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Adhere to site environmental and disease control procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Adhere to site environmental and disease control procedures.

pcs.text: Assess pruned plants to determine if pruning requirements have been met
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Assess pruned plants to determine if pruning requirements have been met?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Assess pruned plants to determine if pruning requirements have been met.

pcs.text: Carry out remedial work as required
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Carry out remedial work as required?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Carry out remedial work as required.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Undertake specialist pruning

elements.title: Complete work

pcs.text: Dispose of or recycle waste material from the site

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Dispose of or recycle waste material from the site.

pcs.text: Clean, maintain and store tools, equipment and machinery
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Clean, maintain and store tools, equipment and machinery?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Clean, maintain and store tools, equipment and machinery.

pcs.text: Identify and report unserviceable tools, equipment and machinery according to workplace procedures

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify and report unserviceable tools, equipment and machinery according to workplace procedures.
